{{Infobox icon
| name = White Sun
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[White Sun Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The White Sun is the primary symbol of the [[Luminian Order]], a group composed of silver-armored knights and white-clad [[Pilgrims]]. It is represented as a crest featuring a white sun, often appearing on red banners or within stained glass. The symbol is frequently worn as a silver medallion or pendant, sometimes featuring a white [[diamond]] at its center. These items serve as powerful Beacons for high-level [[Pilgrims]], capable of emitting blinding light to destroy enemies or providing a sense of peace and safety to those nearby. The symbol is also physically manifested in the architecture of [[Hightower]], the [[Luminian]] headquarters. A massive tower at the site features a large glass orb that acts as a blazing white lantern, serving as a second sun for the guild. This structure contains unified [[Intent]] that can be used to provide protection for the [[Capital]]. Additionally, the White Sun is associated with various titles and roles within the order, such as the [[Captain]] of the [[Knights of the White Sun]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The silver pendant of the [[White Sun]] is worn by [[Andel]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[White Sun]] is the symbol of the [[Luminian Order]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c5">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[White Sun]] of the Luminians is a silver chain ornament worn by [[Andel]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[White Sun]] is a crest featured on red banners at [[Hightower]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[White Sun]] is a decoration on the silver armor of [[Luminian Knights]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[White Sun]] is at [[Hightower]] and has a cleansing and penetrating light.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[White Sun]] emblem is carved into doorposts in the [[Capital]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Andel]] has a [[White Sun]] hanging against his chest.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[White Sun]] provides support to [[Jorin]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[White Sun]] is an item hanging from [[Loreli]]'s chest that emits a soothing white-[[gold light]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
